title: Create utility module with tests
description: Tests end-to-end tool chain: read, plan, write, verify
prompt: Create a new utility module at `lib/string-utils.ts` that exports a function `slugify(text: string): string` which converts text to URL-safe slugs (lowercase, hyphens instead of spaces, remove special chars). Also create a test file at `lib/string-utils.test.ts` with at least 3 test cases.
